tools.name: Picus
tools.description: SMT-based under-constrained signal detector for circom circuits.

tools.name: Civer
tools.description: Verifies circom templates against safety annotations.

tools.name: Ecne
tools.description: R1CS soundness checker that bounds witnesses against inputs.

tools.name: Circomspect
tools.description: Lints circom circuits for known anti-patterns.

tools.name: zkFuzz
tools.description: Genetic fuzzer that searches for unsoundness counterexamples.
